function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0004
alias: northstar_design_partner_sprint
issued_on: 2026-02-08
total_eur: 890
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 650
    line_eur: 650
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar design-partner workflow sprint invoice

```text
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| field          | value                           |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                         |
| invoice_number | INV-0004                        |
| alias          | northstar_design_partner_sprint |
| issued_on      | 2026-02-08                      |
| total_eur      | 890                             |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH   |
| project        | Northstar Ledger                |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                  |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 650      | 650      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 890      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

One of the half-product, half-services invoices that keeps testing the boundary between startup work and bespoke delivery.

next_step.current_state: First finance record updated successfully. Proceeding with second OCR/frontmatter migration on the purchase record, preserving full original body verbatim.
next_step.observation: The prior write completed without tool error.

project: School Helper Kit
related_entity: Ida Novak

    quantity: 1

    line_eur: 11
---

function.message: Completed the next inbound request by running both specified finance documents through the OCR/frontmatter workflow. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to the invoice and bill records while preserving each original note body verbatim, then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, read 99_system workflows/schemas before task work, used finance schema for exact fields, preserved original bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR two listed finance documents. Both target files were read, contained all required schema fields, and were updated in place with YAML frontmatter matching finance-record-frontmatter.md. Original bodies were preserved under frontmatter. After successful completion, the inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox-item.md and inbox-processing-v2-update.md.
